[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010000000 1
1 001010000 2
2 001001011 4
3 100111011 6
4 111011011 7
5 101100100 4
6 111001101 6
7 101100101 5

01 10 001011111 6
12 21 101111011 7
23 32 111111011 8
34 43 111111111 a
45 54 111101101 7
56 65 111101101 7
67 76 111100101 6
70 07 011010100 4

02 20 101111111 8
13 31 111011011 7 match 4
24 42 101111111 8
35 53 111011111 8
46 64 101100101 5 match 7
57 75 111001101 6 match 6
60 06 101110101 6
71 17 011001111 6

03 30 111011111 8
14 41 101101111 7
25 52 111111111 a
36 63 111111111 a
47 74 111100100 5
50 05 111011101 7
61 16 101101111 7
72 27 110111111 8
